holdings.infoBox: KONG is an equity ETF with a total of 60 individual holdings. The top holdings are ServiceNow stock at 5.53%, Fastenal Company at 5.43%, Microsoft at 5.34%, Meta Platforms at 4.74%, and F5, Inc. at 4.28%.

overview.description: The Formidable Fortress ETF (KONG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund seeks to provide long-term capital appreciation by actively selecting a narrow basket of large- and mid-cap stocks from around the world. KONG was launched on Jul 22, 2021 and is issued by Formidable.
